# TACZ Turrets

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/8k8SjeJB&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://modrinth.com/mod/8k8SjeJB)
[![CurseForge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/1376660.svg)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-turrets)

Ever wanted a good turret mod, but you couldn't find any? Ever wanted one that integrates with TACZ? Look no further!

This mod adds turrets that use guns from TACZ. Simply click it with a gun, or drop it near the turret. Clicking a turret that has a gun will take the gun and ammo. The turret has a light on both sides, if it's green then it's good to go, yellow means reloading, bright red is out of ammo and dark red means no gun equipped.

To give a turret a gun, drop it near the turret. To give it ammo, either drop it near the turret or put the turret on a chest and fill the chest with ammo. GUI is a work in progress.

Huge thanks to Corrinedev for making [TACZ NPCs](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-npcs), it was very helpful with getting started to see how things work.
